identity.name: nx-collect
identity.description: Collect canonical session artifacts across providers and return one global latest result through one coordinator running provider-specific shell probes in parallel

flags.name: latest
flags.description: Collect the latest canonical session across configured providers

flags.name: --project
flags.description: Restrict latest lookup to one project path or project hint

flags.name: --timezone
flags.description: IANA timezone for local rendering, default Europe/Moscow

flags.name: --live-within-minutes
flags.description: Files newer than this are marked live

flags.name: --active-within-minutes
flags.description: Files newer than this are marked active

flags.name: --cognize-prompt-id
flags.description: Prompt catalog entry passed to nx-cognize for semantic intent generation

flags.name: --cognize-provider-chain
flags.description: Provider chain passed to nx-cognize, e.g. auto or local

flags.name: --output
flags.description: Output file path; stdout when omitted

exit_codes.2: Invalid arguments or invalid provider config
exit_codes.4: Parse error or output contract violation
